arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold to Real Madrid: FIFA opens SPECIAL transfer window as new bid launched for Liverpool defender
arts.sum: Liverpool could land a surprising transfer windfall from Trent Alexander-Arnold as Real Madrid aim to secure the services of the England full-back early. As such, Real Madrid are still in position to spend on Alexander-Arnold, whose contract with Liverpool does not expire until 30 June – midway through the new tournament.

arts.ttl: I played for Celtic against Real Madrid but now I'm hanging up my boots to become a fashion guru

arts.ttl: Real Madrid 'ready to pay' for early Trent Alexander-Arnold signing after £20m Liverpool transfer decision
arts.sum: Real Madrid are supposedly prepared to pay Liverpool a fee to sign Trent Alexander-Arnold before their Club World Cup campaign begins in the middle of June.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid Tops Kit and Merchandising Revenue Charts
arts.sum: Real Madrid continues its commercial dominance in European football, according to the latest financial analysis released by UEFA this week.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid top FIFA’s Club World Cup cash list ahead of 2025 tournament
arts.sum: Real Madrid stand to secure a major financial boost at this summer’s FIFA Club World Cup in the USA.
